commands.description: Sets a preferred aspect ratio for an element, preventing layout shifts during image loading.
Sets a responsive value that fluidly scales between a defined minimum and maximum range.
Applies graphical effects (like blur or color shift) to the area behind an element.
Container Queries: Styles an element based on the size of its parent container rather than the viewport.
Controls whether the user can select text within an element, useful for UI components like buttons.
